docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $125.00 FILED BY MITCHELL, MICHAEL E. AS TO DEFENDANT NOR-CAL MOVING SERVICES OF SAN JOSE, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-22-1997 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT NOR-CAL MOVING SERVICES OF SAN JOSE, INC.
